title: Italian Pork Dumplings
description: This Italian-inspired dish combines juicy pork dumplings with a floral twist. Perfect for a hearty dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the pork shoulder, flour, egg, Italian seasoning, parsley, and garlic. Mix well.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Bring the mixture to room temperature.
Place a dumpling wrapper on a flat surface and place a tablespoon of the pork mixture in the center.
Fold the wrapper into a triangle and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the dumplings to the skillet, being careful not to overcrowd. Cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Transfer the dumplings to a baking sheet and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
